title: Music Disc Crafter
description: Allows users to craft all creeper-dropped music discs
body:
# Music Disc Crafter

Create all creeper-dropped music discs using various materials.

This mod adds a new item, the Disc Template, which allows you to craft the following music discs, using the Disc Template plus one of the following items:

- Coal: Disc Stal
- Amethyst Shard: Disc Mall
- Allium: Disc Mellohi
- Nether Wart: Disc Ward
- Dandelion: Disc 13
- Raw Cod: Disc Cat
- Cornflower: Disc Where Are We Now
- Oxeye Daisy: Disc Strad
- Slimeball: Disc Far
- Poppy: Disc Chirp
- Brown Mushroom: Disc Blocks
- Wither Rose: Disc 11


The Disc Template can be obtained one of two ways:
- Trading a Librarian Villager
- Smelting an existing music disc


## License
This mod is public domain.  Use it however you like.
